暴君无道、民不聊生、门阀林立、外族虎视眈眈。天道无常、妖魔横行、乱世纷争、天书降临人间。陈玄庚穿越而来，却成为了一个瞎子，签到五年，获得神级人物卡，他是拉二胡的江湖过客，也是登龙虎山，传天师道的仙人，亦是……。
李秀宁：“瞎子，可愿意和我一起布局天下？”
李世民：“瞎子，这乱世，应该由你我来终结！”
陈玄庚：“我真不是天榜第一。”
本书又名《大隋：天剑无名，我被天榜曝光》《大隋天榜！我剑仙身份要曝光了》《玄幻：我是残血拉二胡的剑神无名，也是择日飞升的道祖》","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e30607ef21792daf1b2e87a7c6756785~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"夜半蝉鸣","author_id":"","book_id":"7231908384146983994","book_name":"玄幻：开局瞎子拉二胡，择日飞升","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7231908388450339901","read_count":"36","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"176918"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"82","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,架空,开局,东方玄幻,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e30607ef21792daf1b2e87a7c6756785~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779175634&x-signature=%2BP2ln%2BLYGUxQqyWg5ZGpqVBeyxs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_s
